info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress has many steps to perform properly.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress runs more smoothly with music playing.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: He was pumping his fist as he stepped firmly toward her.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: He was pumping his fist as he stepped firmly toward her.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Making positive changes towards the advancment of civilization is progress played to music.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: For progress to happen, one must take the lead.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes you have to spin around and around before progress can happen.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress is much more than a mosh pit.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: He's always a step or two behind.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: He's always a step or two behind.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To keep up with progress, one cannot be a step or two behind.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Learn and practice the steps, and progress will follow.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When progress is your goal, play lively music and move to the beat.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes, to get progress moving, one must get out there on the floor and start shaking their hips to the music.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When trying to progress, watch out for those who will step on your toes.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you want to progess, you have to move your feet.
